title: Verpine fiber mesh
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Verpine_Fiber_Mesh.jpg|thumb|150px|Verpine Fiber Mesh in use]]
'''Verpine fiber mesh''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] made of [[Verpine fiber]] by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Species/Legends|species]] around the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. During the war, the interstellar pirate [[Raxsus Nuli]] was tracked down and captured by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who seized his many holdings. The captured loot, which included a large stockpile of Verpine weapons and armor including suits of fiber mesh, were sold at auction.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
